<!-- Reference links -->

<!-- CARDAT -->
[cardat-home]: http://cardat.github.io/
[cardat-mail]: mailto:car.data@curtin.edu.au
[cardat-gh]: https://github.com/cardat/
[cardat-data-repo]: https://cloud.car-dat.org/
[cardat-data-inventory]: /data_inventory/index.html

<!-- CARDAT repos -->
[gh-napmdtools]: https://github.com/cardat/napmdtools
[gh-pages-napmdtools]: https://cardat.github.io/napmdtools/
[gh-cardatdbtools]: https://github.com/cardat/cardatdbtools
[gh-bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools]: https://github.com/cardat/bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools
[gh-pages-bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools]: https://cardat.github.io/bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools/
[gh-airhealth-targets-sws]: https://github.com/cardat/air-health-sws-r-targets

<!-- CARDAT data DOIs -->
[doi-aihw-mortality]: https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/GZM5F
[doi-napmd]: https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/JXD98
[doi-bushfire-v1-3-2001-2020]: https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/WQK4T
[doi-bushfire-v1-3-2020-2023]: https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/47C6B


<!-- Other key organisations -->
[whocc-home]: https://research.curtin.edu.au/whocc-cchia/
[csa-home]: https://safeair.org.au/
[heal-home]: https://healnetwork.org.au/
[ardc-home]: https://ardc.edu.au/
[tern-home]: https://www.tern.org.au/
[coesra-home]: https://coesra.tern.org.au/


<!-- internal sections -->
<!-- Data -->
[section-data-napmd]: /data_and_tools/index.qmd#sec-data-napmd
[section-data-aihw-mortality]: /data_and_tools/index.qmd#sec-data-aihw-mortality
[section-data-bushfire-v1-3]: /data_and_tools/index.qmd#sec-data-bushfire-v1-3
<!-- Tools -->
[section-tools-napmdtools]: /data_and_tools/index.qmd#sec-tools-napmdtools
[section-tools-targets-sws]: /data_and_tools/index.qmd#sec-tools-targets-sws
<!-- Projects -->
[section-project-airhealth-bridges]: /projects/index.qmd#sec-project-airhealth-bridges
[section-project-airhealth-sws]: /projects/index.qmd#sec-project-airhealth-Sws
[section-project-bushfire-smoke]: /projects/index.qmd#sec-project-bushfire-smoke
[section-project-apmma]: /projects/index.qmd#sec-project-apmma

[section-data-inventory]: /data_inventory/index.html
